top_signals.title: Iranian Crude Offered to China at Discount as Demand Softens
top_signals.summary: Iranian crude has been slashed for Chinese buyers in an effort to entice interest from independent oil refiners, which have reduced operating rates to stem losses from weaker margins.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Ramping Up LNG Buying in Anticipation of Summer Heat
top_signals.summary: China’s imports of liquefied natural gas are surging as the nation steps up purchases to cope with rising electricity consumption over the hotter summer months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Consortium to Advance e-Fuel Green Corridor Between Brazil and Belgium
top_signals.summary: A new consortium facilitated by the Global Maritime Forum and RMI will work to establish a green shipping corridor between the Port of Açu in Brazil and the Port of Antwerp-Bruges in Belgium.In addition to the port teams on both ends of the corridor…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Hands on with Intelligent Terminal, an AI-powered Windows Terminal
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has created an open-source fork of Windows Terminal called "Intelligent Terminal," and it allows you to use AI directly inside Terminal without interfering with the regular session. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
